items.name: Eye of the Red Avernus
items.description:
Unleash the fiery wrath of the Eye of the Red Avernus! Beware, for when darkness falls, the crimson gaze pierces through, heralding the arrival of the infernal guardian. Dare to wield its power, but heed the warning: once awakened, its fury knows no bounds. hbkT

items.name: Code:RNEYE /  Eye of the Eternal Chromatic Grove
items.description:
Buy: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/136988172888021/Eye-of-the-Eternal-Chromatic-Grove
Redeem: https://www.roblox.com/games/15108736400/Flex-UGC-Codes
Code: RNEYE

Forged deep within the heart of the Eternal Chromatic Grove, this mystical eye sees through time, light, and illusion. Branch-like antlers mark its connection to ancient forest spirits, while the shifting colors of its iris pulse with the energy of forgotten realms. Wearing it means more than seeing — it means being seen by something greater.
